title: sedum acre subsp. neglectum
intro: Sedum acre subsp. neglectum, also known as yellow stonecrop, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Sedum acre subsp. neglectum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
